nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: [Tests] use a better JSON parsing implementation

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
[New] allow `.nvmrc` files to support comments

In theory, `npx nvmrc` can now be used to validate an `.nvmrc` file that `nvm` will support. Allowances have been made for future extensibility, and aliases may no longer contain a `#`.

Fixes #3336. Closes #2288.

Co-authored-by: Jordan Harband <ljharb@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Yash Singh <saiansh2525@gmail.com>
added_lines: +  NVM_RC_VERSION="$(command head -n 1 "${NVMRC_PATH}" | command tr -d '\r')" || command printf ''

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
[Fix] `nvm_normalize_lts`: switch from expr to case

avoids `expr: warning: ^lts/-[1-9][0-9]*: using ^ as the first character of a basic regular expression is not portable; it is ignored`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: [Fix] `debug`: correct mistaken `-V` to `--version` from #2922
removed_lines: -        nvm_err "awk: $(nvm_command_info awk), $({ command awk --version 2>/dev/null || command awk -W version; } \
added_lines: +        nvm_err "awk: $(nvm_command_info awk), $({ command awk -V 2>/dev/null || command awk -W version; } \

Fixes #2599

added_lines: +    NVM_NPM_CONFIG_x_PREFIX_ENV="$(command set | command awk -F '=' '! /^[0-9A-Z_a-z]+=/ {exit} {print $1}' | nvm_grep -i NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX | command tail -1)"

Don't check `$1` unless `$#` is >= 1.

Fixes #873. Partially fixes #868.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: [shellcheck] double-quote vars in more places
removed_lines: -        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | sed "s/^$NVM_IMPLICIT-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
[shellcheck] read without -r will mangle backslashes.

http://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/009695399/utilities/read.html / https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/wiki/SC2162

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make sure `nvm debug` doesn't use an overridden `sed`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Johan Bergström
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Use `xz` tarballs if available

Saves us ~25% bandwidth while downloading the payload. This only applies
to hosts that has the `xz` binary and attempts to use iojs 2.3.2 or newer
(this includes nodejs 4.0+ as well). Older targets are unaffected.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Create and use `nvm_sanitize_path` for `nvm debug`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Add support for `--silent` to `nvm run` and `nvm exec`.

Fixes #842.
removed_lines: -      echo '    --reinstall-packages-from=<version>     When installing, reinstall packages installed in <node|iojs|node version number>'
added_lines: +      echo '    --reinstall-packages-from=<version> When installing, reinstall packages installed in <node|iojs|node version number>'

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
When no `io.js` versions are installed, show `N/A`, not `io.js-`, as the resolved default alias.

Fixes #822.
removed_lines: -        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | sed "s/^"$NVM_IMPLICIT"-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"
added_lines: +      NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$($NVM_COMMAND | sed "s/^"$NVM_IMPLICIT"-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Sort `nvm ls-remote` output so the order is: "pre-merged", "iojs", "post-merged".

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Oops, the string passed to `awk` isn't the same as a shell command.

Fixes #808.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Prefixing more commands with `command` to bypass aliases.

Related to #805 and #804.
removed_lines: -      NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$($NVM_COMMAND | sed "s/^"$NVM_IMPLICIT"-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"

added_lines: +      echo "    --reinstall-packages-from=<version> When installing, reinstall packages installed in <node|iojs|node version number>"

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Some refactoring to clear up the path to `io.js` release candidate support.

(unblocks #779)
removed_lines: -      NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$($NVM_COMMAND | sed "s/^"$NVM_IMPLICIT"-//" | command grep -e '^v' | cut -c2- | cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | tail -1)"

added_lines: +      LINKS="$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -n 's/.* -> \(.*\)/\1/ p')" # | command sed -e '/^ *$/d;s/.*/"&"/')

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: `nvm reinstall-packages` should install the same version it had before.

-      LINKS="$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -n 's/.* -> \(.*\)/\1/ p')" # | command sed -e '/^ *$/d;s/.*/"&"/')

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: nvm reinstall-packages: On systems where `npm ls -g --depth=0` does not include `npm` for some reason, make sure to filter out `(empty)`.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jo Liss
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Consolidate and avoid sed/cut calls, clean up pattern matches

Some patterns contained a no-op `*`; the `*` would match the empty string
because # or % replacement (unlike ## or %%) tries to find the shortest match.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Remove external calls to `sed` using parameter filtering.

POSIX-compliant per http://stackoverflow.com/a/25536935/632724

Relates to #709
added_lines: +  echo "$1" | command sed -e 's/^v//' | command awk -F. '{ printf("%d%06d%06d\n", $1,$2,$3); }'
+  NVM_NUM_DOTS=$(echo "$VERSION" | command sed -e 's/^v//' | command sed -e 's/\.$//' | command sed -e 's/[^\.]//g')

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Avoid some external calls by using case statements.

Relates to #709.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Pedro Costa
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Supresses error message on checking source options

nvm-sh/nvm.author: HE Shi-Jun
nvm-sh/nvm.message: support npm link
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)
added_lines: +        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)
+        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: HE Shi-Jun
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Only filter the package npm, not any package name contains 'npm'
removed_lines: -        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)
-        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)
added_lines: +        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)
+        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)

Refactor and create `nvm_remote_versions` and `nvm_remote_version`.

Fixes #620 - an oh-my-zsh issue where `nvm install v1` didn't work.

Add support for `nvm use node`, `nvm use iojs`, `nvm ls node`, and `nvm ls iojs`

Also add `nvm_version node` and `nvm_version iojs` support.

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Consistently prefix builtins with `command`
removed_lines: -  echo "$1" | command sed -e 's/^v//' | command awk -F. '{ printf("%d%06d%06d\n", $1,$2,$3); }'
-        | command sort -t. -u -k 1.2,1n -k 2,2n -k 3,3n | command grep -v '^ *\.' | command grep -e '^v' | command grep -v -e '^versions$'`
-        | command sort -t. -u -k 1.2,1n -k 2,2n -k 3,3n | command grep -v '^ *\.' | command grep -e '^v'`
-    LAST_TWO=$(nvm_ls | command grep -e '^v' | cut -c2- | cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq)
-    LAST_TWO=$(nvm_ls_remote | command grep -e '^v' | cut -c2- | cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq)
-            sum=`nvm_download -L -s $NVM_NODEJS_ORG_MIRROR/$VERSION/SHASUMS.txt -o - | command grep node-${t}.tar.gz | command awk '{print $1}'`
-        sum=`nvm_download -L -s $NVM_NODEJS_ORG_MIRROR/$VERSION/SHASUMS.txt -o - | command grep node-$VERSION.tar.gz | command awk '{print $1}'`
-        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)
-        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)
added_lines: +        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
+        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Use `command sed` for people who alias `sed`.

Fixes #493.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Rename `nvm copy-packages` to `nvm reinstall-packages`, and `--copy-packages-from` install option to `--reinstall-packages-from`

For #341. `nvm copy-packages` and install option `--copy-packages-from` will continue to be supported for for at least a full minor release version.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Ensure nvm follows redirects to nodejs.org

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Properly handle nvm_print_implicit_alias splitting in zsh.

Hopefully fixes #546.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Create nvm_ensure_version_prefix, and make nvm_format_version actually format the version.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: nvm_ls: format the version immediately, so that `nvm ls 0.0.1` doesn't return `nvm ls 0.0.10`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Use _ instead of ~ as a sentinel

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Use `nvm_normalize_version` in `nvm_version_greater`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make `nvm copy-packages system` work.
removed_lines: -        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
-        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: `npm ls` has a bug in some versions when "--parseable --depth=0" is used together.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Don't try to copy `npm` itself with `nvm copy-packages`.

Fixes #504.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make sure the new `versions` directory is filtered out of nvm_ls output (in zsh).

nvm-sh/nvm.author: egilkh
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Should escape grep in copy-packages.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make `nvm ls` support listing the "versions" directory when it's present.

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Jordan Harband
nvm-sh/nvm.message: Attempt to improve `nvm copy-packages`
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | \grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f $(($ROOTDEPTH + 2)) | cut -d ":" -f 2 | \grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`

nvm-sh/nvm.author: Lucian Holland
nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Rewrote version listing system

Now sorts correctly in all instances and prints highlights
even in sorted views. Also will output a list of matching versions
for commands of the form nvm ls 0.4* rather than just printing one
version. nvm version 0.4 still prints the single latest matching
version, however.
